ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: By the sky containing great stars
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: By the sky full of constellations,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the promised Day
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the promised Day ˹of Judgment˺,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the witness and what is witnessed!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Cursed were the companions of the trench
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Condemned are the makers of the ditch—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Containing] the fire full of fuel,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: the fire ˹pit˺, filled with fuel—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When they were sitting near it
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: when they sat around it,

ayahs.textArabic: وَهُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ بِٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ شُهُودٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wahum AAala ma yafAAaloona bialmumineena shuhoodun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: watching what they had ˹ordered to be˺ done to the believers,

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَا نَقَمُواْ مِنۡهُمۡ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡحَمِيدِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama naqamoo minhum illa an yuminoo biAllahi alAAazeezi alhameedi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who they resented for no reason other than belief in Allah—the Almighty, the Praiseworthy—

ayahs.textArabic: ٱلَّذِي لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ شَهِيدٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Allathee lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi waAllahu AAala kulli shayin shaheedun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹the One˺ to Whom belongs the kingdom of the heavens and earth. And Allah is a Witness over all things.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُواْ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَتُوبُواْ فَلَهُمۡ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابُ ٱلۡحَرِيقِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna allatheena fatanoo almumineena waalmuminati thumma lam yatooboo falahum AAathabu jahannama walahum AAathabu alhareeqi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Those who persecute the believing men and women and then do not repent will certainly suffer the punishment of Hell and the torment of burning.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمۡ جَنَّٰتٞ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati lahum jannatun tajree min tahtiha alanharu thalika alfawzu alkabeeru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely those who believe and do good will have Gardens under which rivers flow. That is the greatest triumph.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the ˹crushing˺ grip of your Lord is severe.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹For˺ He is certainly the One Who originates and resurrects ˹all˺.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And He is the All-Forgiving, All-Loving—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Honorable Owner of the Throne,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Lord of the Throne, the All-Glorious,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Effecter of what He intends.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Doer of whatever He wills.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Has there reached you the story of the soldiers -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Has the story of the ˹destroyed˺ forces reached you ˹O Prophet˺—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Those of] Pharaoh and Thamud?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹the forces of˺ Pharaoh and Thamûd?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Yet the disbelievers ˹still˺ persist in denial.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: While Allah encompasses them from behind.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But Allah encompasses them from all sides.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But this is an honored Qur'an
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: In fact, this is a glorious Quran,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹recorded˺ in a Preserved Tablet.
